storyBeat: 浦島救烏龜 — 烏龜會謝謝他嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 fisherman = 漁夫
🔑 beach = 沙灘
🔑 turtle = 烏龜
🔑 kind = 好心
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago, a kind young fisherman lived by the sea.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,一個好心的年輕漁夫住在海邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His name was Urashima Taro.
questions.explanationZh: 他的名字叫浦島太郎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day he rowed his small boat out to fish.
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima do hard work every day?
questions.explanationZh: 每天划著小船出海捕魚——日子再苦,他也從沒喊過累。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天,他划著小漁船出海捕魚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One afternoon, he saw three boys near the rocks.
questions.explanationZh: 一個下午,他看見三個男孩在石頭邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were poking a small turtle with sticks.
questions.question: What were the boys doing?
questions.explanationZh: 拿棍子戳牠,這就是欺負嘛。所以選「欺負牠」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們正用木棍戳弄著一隻小烏龜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima ran to the boys and gave them some coins.
questions.explanationZh: 浦島跑到男孩那邊,給他們一些錢幣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He used his own money to set the turtle free.
questions.question: Why did he give them coins?
questions.explanationZh: 他用自己的錢換來烏龜的自由,就是為了救牠。選「救烏龜」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用自己的錢把烏龜贖了出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took the turtle to the sea, slow and careful.
questions.explanationZh: 他帶著烏龜走向海,慢慢的、小心的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Urashima set the turtle down?
questions.question: How did he set it down?
questions.explanationZh: 前面說「慢慢的、小心的」——他是輕輕把烏龜放到沙灘上,不是丟喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島是怎麼把烏龜放下的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的關鍵字,配對試試看！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago, a kind young fisherman lived by the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 很久以前,一個好心的年輕漁夫住在海邊。
questions.question: Where did the fisherman live?
questions.explanationZh: by the sea = 住在海邊——答「海邊」就對了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw three boys near the rocks.
questions.sentenceZh: 他看見三個男孩在石頭邊。
questions.questionEn: Were the boys being kind to the turtle?
questions.explanationZh: 男孩們拿棍子戳烏龜——那可不是好心對待牠,答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima paid to keep the turtle safe.
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島付錢讓烏龜平安。
questions.question: What did Urashima use to free the turtle?
questions.explanationZh: his own money = 他自己的錢——他把錢給男孩換烏龜的自由。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of person was Urashima?
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島是個怎樣的人？
questions.question: What kind of person was he?
questions.explanationZh: 給錢救烏龜——善良又有愛心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One of these names belongs to the kind fisherman.
questions.sentenceZh: 其中一個名字屬於那個好心的漁夫。
questions.question: What was the young fisherman's name?
questions.explanationZh: His name was Urashima Taro——他叫浦島太郎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took the turtle to the sea, slow and careful.
questions.sentenceZh: 他帶著烏龜走向海,慢慢的、小心的。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima rush when carrying the turtle?
questions.explanationZh: slow and careful = 慢慢的、小心的——他沒有急,答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turtle looks up at him with quiet, dark eyes...
questions.explanationZh: 烏龜抬頭看他,眼神安靜又深邃……

storyBeat: 烏龜帶他下海 — 海底是什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 boat = 船
🔑 climb = 爬上
🔑 dive = 潛
🔑 deep = 深
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A few days later, Urashima sat in his small boat.
questions.explanationZh: 幾天後,浦島坐在他的小船上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sea was very still, with no waves at all.
questions.question: How was the sea that day?
questions.explanationZh: still 是「靜止」,no waves 是「沒有浪」——海面又靜又平,選「平靜」。
questions.sentenceZh: 海面靜靜的，一絲浪也沒有。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A big turtle swam up beside the boat.
questions.explanationZh: 一隻大烏龜游到船邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It said, "Thank you. I am the one you saved."
questions.questionEn: Was this an ordinary turtle?
questions.explanationZh: 你看,牠會開口說話耶!普通烏龜可不會這樣——牠當然不是普通烏龜,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠說：「謝謝你，我就是你救的那隻烏龜。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The sea king wants to meet you," the turtle said.
questions.explanationZh: 「海王想見你,」烏龜說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the turtle ask Urashima to do?
questions.question: What did the turtle ask?
questions.explanationZh: 爬上背 = climb on its back。
questions.sentenceZh: 烏龜請浦島做什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima could not believe his ears. But he climbed on.
questions.explanationZh: 浦島不敢相信自己的耳朵。但他爬上去了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They went down past bright fish and soft coral.
questions.question: What did they see on the way down?
questions.explanationZh: 他們往下潛,看到亮亮的魚和軟軟的珊瑚——換個說法就是「海洋生物和礁石植物」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一路往下游，身旁是閃亮的魚群和柔軟的珊瑚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Down and down they went, into the blue water.
questions.explanationZh: 他們一直往下、往下,進入藍色的水裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的單字，配對一次。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The grateful turtle returned before much time had passed.
questions.sentenceZh: 感恩的烏龜在不久之後就回來了。
questions.question: How much time passed before the turtle came back?
questions.explanationZh: a few days = 幾天——沒有過很久。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sea was very still, with no waves at all.
questions.sentenceZh: 海面靜靜的，一絲浪也沒有。
questions.questionEn: Was the sea rough and stormy that day?
questions.explanationZh: still = 靜止，no waves = 沒有浪——風平浪靜，完全不粗野，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It said, "Thank you. I am the one you saved."
questions.sentenceZh: 牠說：「謝謝你，我就是你救的那隻烏龜。」
questions.question: Who came back to thank Urashima?
questions.explanationZh: I am the one you saved = 我就是你救的那隻——烏龜回來道謝了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Urashima feel when the turtle spoke?
questions.sentenceZh: 烏龜開口說話時，浦島是什麼感覺？
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: could not believe his ears = 不敢相信耳朵——當然嚇到了，驚訝又不敢相信。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They went down past bright fish and soft coral.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一路往下游，身旁是閃亮的魚群和柔軟的珊瑚。
questions.question: What did they pass on the way down?
questions.explanationZh: bright fish + soft coral = 閃亮的魚和珊瑚——水下的美麗世界。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima could not believe his ears. But he climbed on.
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島不敢相信自己的耳朵。但他爬上去了。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima decide to go with the turtle?
questions.explanationZh: 他爬上去——不再猶豫了。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Down and down they go. The light above grows dim...
questions.explanationZh: 他們一直往下、往下。上面的光越來越暗……

storyBeat: 龍宮公主歡迎他 — 他能留下嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 palace = 宮殿
🔑 princess = 公主
🔑 welcome = 歡迎
🔑 throne = 寶座
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the bottom of the sea stood a great sea palace.
questions.explanationZh: 海底有一座大大的海底宮殿。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The walls shone like pearl and the gates were made of shell.
questions.question: What was the sea palace like?
questions.explanationZh: 牆壁閃著珍珠光,門是貝殼做的——明亮又美麗,不是嗎?選「亮亮美美的」。
questions.sentenceZh: 牆壁像珍珠一樣發光，大門是用貝殼砌成的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A beautiful princess sat on a throne inside.
questions.explanationZh: 裡面有一位美麗的公主坐在寶座上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She said, "I was that little turtle on the beach."
questions.questionEn: Was the princess a stranger?
questions.explanationZh: 她說她就是沙灘上那隻烏龜——所以她不是陌生人,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她說：「我就是那天在沙灘上的小烏龜。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her name was Otohime, princess of the sea.
questions.explanationZh: 她叫乙姬,海的公主。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the princess greet him?
questions.question: How did she greet him?
questions.explanationZh: soft smile = 溫柔的微笑。
questions.sentenceZh: 公主是怎麼迎接他的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She took his hand and walked with him gently.
questions.explanationZh: 她牽起他的手,輕輕地跟他走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She led him into a long dining hall full of light.
questions.question: Where did she lead him?
questions.explanationZh: long 是「長」,full of light 是「充滿光」——一個又長又亮的房間。
questions.sentenceZh: 她帶他走進一間長長的大廳，燈火通明。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Music played softly. The doors closed behind them.
questions.explanationZh: 音樂輕輕響起。門在他們身後關上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 宮殿裡的 4 個關鍵字，配對看看！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The walls shone like pearl and the gates were made of shell.
questions.sentenceZh: 牆壁像珍珠一樣發光，大門是用貝殼砌成的。
questions.question: What were the walls made of?
questions.explanationZh: shone like pearl = 像珍珠一樣發光——牆壁閃著珍珠光，選那個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the bottom of the sea stood a great sea palace.
questions.sentenceZh: 海底有一座大大的海底宮殿。
questions.questionEn: Was the sea palace tiny?
questions.explanationZh: 這座宮殿大得他從來沒見過——不是小地方。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She _____ him into a long dining hall full of light.
questions.sentenceZh: 她帶他走進一間長長的大廳。
questions.question: Choose the correct word to fill the blank.
questions.explanationZh: lead 的過去式是 led（不規則）。句子說的是以前發生的事，用 led。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A beautiful princess sat on a throne inside.
questions.sentenceZh: 裡面有一位美麗的公主坐在寶座上。
questions.question: Where was the princess sitting?
questions.explanationZh: sat on a throne = 坐在寶座上——公主在裡面的寶座上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the princess say she used to be?
questions.sentenceZh: 公主說她以前是什麼？
questions.question: What did she say?
options: 🐟 a small fish in the sea
🐢 the little turtle on the beach
questions.explanationZh: I was that little turtle on the beach = 我就是沙灘上那隻小烏龜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Music played softly. The doors closed behind them.
questions.sentenceZh: 音樂輕輕響起。門在他們身後關上。
questions.questionEn: Did the doors stay open behind them?
questions.explanationZh: the doors closed behind them = 門在他們身後關上——門沒有開著，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Stay one day," she says. "Or stay forever..."
questions.explanationZh: 「住一天,」她說。「或者永遠住下來……」

storyBeat: 浦島開心住下 — 真的開心嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 dream = 夢
🔑 dance = 跳舞
🔑 mother = 媽媽
🔑 miss = 想念
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima ate sweet fish and rice from a gold cup.
questions.explanationZh: 浦島吃甜甜的魚和飯,用金色的杯子喝。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Fish servants danced. Music played all night long.
questions.question: How were the nights in the palace?
questions.explanationZh: 魚僕人在跳舞,音樂整晚都響著——熱熱鬧鬧、歌舞不停,選「熱鬧又有音樂」。
questions.sentenceZh: 魚形僕人翩翩起舞，音樂整夜響個不停。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Days passed like a dream. He laughed and sang.
questions.explanationZh: 日子像夢一樣過去。他又笑又唱。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not feel hungry. He did not feel cold.
questions.questionEn: Did he need anything in the palace?
questions.explanationZh: 不餓、也不冷——在龍宮什麼都不缺,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他不覺得餓，也不覺得冷。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked in the coral garden with the princess.
questions.explanationZh: 他跟公主一起在珊瑚花園散步。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did he see in the garden?
questions.question: What did he see?
questions.explanationZh: coral garden = 珊瑚和亮魚。
questions.sentenceZh: 他在花園裡看到了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But in the quiet hours, he thought of his old mother.
questions.explanationZh: 但在安靜的時刻,他想起年老的媽媽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought of his little house by the sea.
questions.question: What did Urashima miss?
questions.explanationZh: 他想起媽媽,又想起海邊的小房子——那就是老家的生活呀。
questions.sentenceZh: 他想起了海邊那間小小的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night, his heart felt warm and a little heavy.
questions.explanationZh: 每個晚上,他的心又暖又有一點沉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚故事的單字，配對試試。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The palace kitchen prepared many wonderful foods for Urashima.
questions.sentenceZh: 宮殿廚房為浦島準備了許多美好的食物。
questions.question: What did Urashima eat in the palace?
questions.explanationZh: sweet fish and rice from a gold cup = 甜魚和飯，用金杯——宮殿的食物真豐盛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Days passed like a dream. He laughed and sang.
questions.sentenceZh: 日子像夢一樣過去。他又笑又唱。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima feel sad in the palace?
questions.explanationZh: laughed and sang = 又笑又唱——他是開心的，不是難過，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked in the coral garden with the princess.
questions.sentenceZh: 他跟公主一起在珊瑚花園散步。
questions.question: What did Urashima do with the princess?
options: cooked food for the sea king
questions.explanationZh: walked in the coral garden with the princess = 跟公主一起在珊瑚花園散步。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Urashima miss the most in the quiet hours?
questions.sentenceZh: 安靜的時刻，浦島最想念什麼？
questions.question: What did he miss?
questions.explanationZh: thought of his old mother + his little house = 他想念老媽媽和老家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But in the quiet hours, he thought of his old mother.
questions.sentenceZh: 但在安靜的時刻,他想起年老的媽媽。
questions.question: When did Urashima think of his mother?
questions.explanationZh: in the quiet hours = 在安靜的時刻——安靜下來才想起媽媽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night, his heart felt warm and a little heavy.
questions.sentenceZh: 每個晚上,他的心又暖又有一點沉。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima feel only happy in the palace?
questions.explanationZh: warm and a little heavy = 暖又有點沉——有一點憂，不是只有開心，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But late at night, he thinks of his old mother by the sea...
questions.explanationZh: 但深夜裡,他想念海邊年老的媽媽……

storyBeat: 想家了要回去 — 公主給他寶盒

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 go home = 回家
🔑 gift = 禮物
🔑 red = 紅
🔑 promise = 答應
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, Urashima told the princess he must go home.
questions.explanationZh: 一個早上,浦島告訴公主他必須回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My mother is waiting. My village is waiting."
questions.question: Why did Urashima want to go home?
questions.explanationZh: 「我媽媽在等、我的村莊在等」——他念著家人,就是因為「家人在等他」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「媽媽在等我，村子裡的人也在等我。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess looked very sad but did not say no.
questions.explanationZh: 公主看起來很難過,但她沒有說不。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She turned away and quietly wiped one tear.
questions.questionEn: Was the princess happy to see him go?
questions.explanationZh: 她轉過身,悄悄擦了一滴眼淚——她捨不得,當然不開心,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她轉過身去，悄悄拭去眼角的一滴淚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave him a small red box tied with a gold rope.
questions.explanationZh: 她給他一個小小的紅盒子,綁著金色的繩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the box look like?
questions.question: What did the box look like?
questions.explanationZh: small + red → small and red。
questions.sentenceZh: 那個盒子長什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is called the Tamatebako," she said softly.
questions.explanationZh: 「這個叫玉手箱,」她輕聲說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Please, never open it. Promise me. Never."
questions.question: What did she ask Urashima to promise?
questions.explanationZh: never open = 永遠不要打開——就是要他把蓋子蓋好、不要打開。選「保持蓋子緊閉」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「千萬不要打開它。答應我，永遠不要。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big turtle was waiting at the palace gate.
questions.explanationZh: 大烏龜在宮殿門口等。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字，配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, Urashima told the princess he must go home.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個早上,浦島告訴公主他必須回家。
questions.question: When did Urashima tell the princess he wanted to leave?
questions.explanationZh: one morning = 一個早上——他在早晨告訴公主要走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess looked very sad but did not say no.
questions.sentenceZh: 公主看起來很難過,但她沒有說不。
questions.questionEn: Did the princess stop Urashima from going home?
questions.explanationZh: did not say no = 她沒有說不——她沒有阻止他，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave him a small red box tied with a gold rope.
questions.sentenceZh: 她給他一個小小的紅盒子,綁著金色的繩子。
questions.question: What was tied around the box?
questions.explanationZh: tied with a gold rope = 綁著金色繩子——就是那條金繩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was the princess's warning about the box?
questions.sentenceZh: 公主對這個盒子的警告是什麼？
questions.question: What did she warn him?
questions.explanationZh: never open it = 永遠不要打開——她最重要的叮嚀就是這句。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Please, never open it. Promise me. Never."
questions.sentenceZh: 「千萬不要打開它。答應我，永遠不要。」
questions.question: What did the princess ask Urashima to promise?
questions.explanationZh: never open it = 永遠不要打開——她要他保證不開盒子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big turtle was waiting at the palace gate.
questions.sentenceZh: 大烏龜在宮殿門口等。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima have to find his own way home?
questions.explanationZh: the turtle was waiting = 烏龜在等他——牠來接他回去，他不用自己找路，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Take this Tamatebako," she says. "But never, never open it..."
questions.explanationZh: 「拿著這個玉手箱,」她說。「但永遠、永遠不要打開……」

storyBeat: 回到岸上 — 沒人認得他了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 shore = 岸
🔑 village = 村莊
🔑 strange = 陌生
🔑 hundred = 一百
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turtle brought Urashima up to the warm sand.
questions.explanationZh: 烏龜把浦島帶回到溫暖的沙灘。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sun was bright. The sand looked just the same.
questions.questionEn: Did the beach itself look strange?
questions.explanationZh: just the same = 跟以前一樣——沙灘本身沒變,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 陽光很亮，沙灘看起來和以前一模一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked up to his village and stopped.
questions.explanationZh: 他走到村莊,然後停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The houses were new. The trees were tall and strange.
questions.question: How was the village now?
questions.explanationZh: 新房子、長高的樹、陌生的感覺——村子全變了,選「全新又不一樣」。
questions.sentenceZh: 房子是新的，樹長得又高又陌生。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw an old, old man sitting on a bench.
questions.explanationZh: 他看到一個很老很老的人坐在長椅上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Who did Urashima meet in the village?
questions.question: Who did he meet?
questions.explanationZh: 老人 = old man。
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島在村裡遇見了誰？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Where is my mother's house?" Urashima asked.
questions.explanationZh: 「我媽媽的家在哪?」浦島問。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "That name is in old stories. A long, long time ago."
questions.question: What did the old man say about Urashima?
questions.explanationZh: 老人說那個名字「是老故事裡的人」——浦島活在老故事裡了,選那個答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「那個名字在很久很久以前的故事裡才有。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "He went out to sea and never came back."
questions.explanationZh: 「他出海以後就再也沒回來。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字，配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked up to his village and stopped.
questions.sentenceZh: 他走到村莊,然後停下來。
questions.question: Why did Urashima stop in the village?
questions.explanationZh: 後來知道村子變了——他停下來是因為感覺一切都不對勁、很陌生。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The houses were new. The trees were tall and strange.
questions.sentenceZh: 房子是新的，樹長得又高又陌生。
questions.questionEn: Did the village look exactly the same as before?
questions.explanationZh: new houses + tall strange trees = 村子都變了，不一樣了，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "That name is in old stories. A long, long time ago."
questions.sentenceZh: 「那個名字在很久很久以前的故事裡才有。」
questions.question: What did the old man say about Urashima's name?
optionsZh: 那個名字是水手的意思
那是古老故事裡的名字
questions.explanationZh: in old stories = 在老故事裡——那個名字是很久以前的事了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How long had Urashima really been away?
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島其實離開了多久？
questions.question: How long was he away?
questions.explanationZh: a hundred years ago = 一百年前——他在海底一百年！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "He went out to sea and never came back."
questions.sentenceZh: 「他出海以後就再也沒回來。」
questions.question: What did the village people believe about Urashima?
questions.explanationZh: went out to sea and never came back = 出海就再也沒回來——村民以為他消失在海上了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sun was bright. The sand looked just the same.
questions.sentenceZh: 陽光很亮，沙灘看起來和以前一模一樣。
questions.questionEn: Did everything in the village feel familiar to Urashima?
questions.explanationZh: houses new, trees strange = 村子已經不一樣了，不是熟悉的樣子，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "That was a hundred years ago." Nothing — and no one — is the same...
questions.explanationZh: 「那是一百年前的事。」一切——還有每一個人——都不一樣了……

storyBeat: 打開寶盒 → 變老頭 (時間紅利)

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 untie = 解開
🔑 open = 打開
🔑 cloud = 雲
🔑 beard = 鬍子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Urashima sat down on the sand. His hands shook.
questions.explanationZh: 浦島坐在沙上。他的手在抖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother was gone. His friends were gone too.
questions.question: How did Urashima feel now?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽不在了,朋友也不在了——這世界上他孤零零一個,選「在世界上很孤單」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他媽媽走了，朋友們也都不在了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the small red box in his hands.
questions.explanationZh: 他看著手裡的小紅盒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had promised. But he was all alone now.
questions.questionEn: Was it easy to keep the promise?
questions.explanationZh: 他好孤單,又無處可去——明明答應過,但心裡好痛,說不要打開真的很難,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他曾答應過她，可是現在他只剩自己了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, he untied the gold rope. He opened the lid.
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢的,他解開金繩子。他打開蓋子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What came out of the box?
questions.question: What came out?
questions.explanationZh: 白雲 = soft white cloud。
questions.sentenceZh: 盒子裡跑出了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cloud rose up around him in the wind.
questions.explanationZh: 雲在風裡升起來,圍住他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When the wind cleared, he was a very old man with a long beard.
questions.question: How did Urashima change?
options: aged into a very old man
questions.explanationZh: 打開盒子之後,他變成了有著長鬍子的很老的人——注意,是變老,不是死喔。選「變成很老的人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 風散去後，他已成了一個蓄著長鬚的老老人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His hair was white as snow. The hundred years came back.
questions.explanationZh: 他的頭髮白得像雪。一百年回到他身上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字,配對一次。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother was gone. His friends were gone too.
questions.sentenceZh: 他媽媽走了，朋友們也都不在了。
questions.question: What had happened to the people Urashima loved?
questions.explanationZh: mother was gone + friends were gone = 媽媽和朋友都走了——都不在了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the small red box in his hands.
questions.sentenceZh: 他看著手裡的小紅盒。
questions.questionEn: Did Urashima throw the box away?
questions.explanationZh: he looked at the box = 他看著它——他還握著盒子，沒有丟掉，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, he _____ the gold rope and opened the lid.
questions.sentenceZh: 他慢慢地解開金繩子，打開蓋子。
questions.question: Choose the correct word to fill the blank.
questions.explanationZh: 這句說的是以前發生的事，動詞要用過去式。untie 的過去式是 untied。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When the wind cleared, he was a very old man with a long beard.
questions.sentenceZh: 風散去後，他已成了一個蓄著長鬚的老老人。
questions.question: What happened after Urashima opened the box?
questions.explanationZh: he was a very old man = 他變成很老的人——打開盒子，時間全回來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was the lesson of Urashima's story?
questions.sentenceZh: 浦島太郎故事的啟示是什麼？
questions.question: What can we learn?
options: 🐢 turtles are always safe to follow
⏰ time away can cost more than we know
optionsZh: 離開的時間代價比我們知道的更大
questions.explanationZh: 一百年過去了，一切都沒了——時間的代價很大，那是這個故事的啟示。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His hair was white as snow. The hundred years came back.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的頭髮白得像雪。一百年回到他身上。
questions.questionEn: Did the box keep the hundred years inside it?
questions.explanationZh: the hundred years came back = 一百年回到他身上——盒子封住了時間，打開後時間全回來了，答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A very old man with a long beard sits quietly on the sand...
questions.explanationZh: 一個白鬍子很長的老人安靜地坐在沙上……
